content.en:
Outside the Origin Realm where the Reincarnation Domain, the Land of Eternity, and the Ruins of Reincarnation were located, a Supreme Dao Realm powerhouse descended here and blocked this Origin Realm, and the most powerful one of them had reached the Double Supreme Dao Realm.

Between the Dao realms, every time you improve, the difference in strength is incomparably large.

A double supreme realm was enough to easily kill Ye Tian.

Therefore, the Infinite Heavenly Palace's dispatch of a double supreme Dao realm has been extremely important.

However, even if the Wuji Heavenly Palace guessed it, it would be impossible for Ye Tian to go out of the Origin Realm again, unless his strength was raised to the level of fearless Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Besides, he already had a clone left in the Infinity Domain, and he didn't need to copy his body anymore.

Of course, before this matter returned to calm, he would still hide himself and learn about the situation in the Infinite Domain by the way.

......

Liujin Continent, a mysterious giant city.

Ye Tian's copy body is staying here, and the identity of his copy body is the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Six Awakenings, Dongguang!

The strength of this replica body is relatively weak, and it is also very inconspicuous, and it has no friends and acquaintances with the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

But because of this, it's suitable for hiding!

In the following days, Ye Tian first inquired about the intelligence of the Liujin Continent, and then slowly probed the intelligence of the entire Wuji Domain.

And this information is not a secret, after a period of time, Ye Tian has some understanding of the area he is in now.

"Infinite Domain, Infinite Heavenly Palace!"

Ye Tian now knew that the place he was in now was in the Infinite Domain, and the most powerful force in the Infinite Domain was naturally the Infinite Heavenly Palace.

In addition to the Wuji Heavenly Palace, there are some sub-forces, and their strength should not be underestimated, if they are united, they are also qualified to compete with the Wuji Heavenly Palace, but those forces cannot all be united, and some of them are supported or even secretly controlled by the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Ye Tian didn't know much about the Wuji Heavenly Palace, after all, his current cultivation was not qualified to understand the entire Wuji Heavenly Palace, he only knew that the Wuji Heavenly Palace had a lot of supreme realms.

The supreme realm is the realm above the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, which is incomparably powerful.

Any Supreme Dao Realm can easily pinch to death a group of Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

There are many Void Continents and some Origin Realms in the Infinite Domain, among which the Liujin Continent is an ordinary Void Continent, which belongs to the force of the Liuli Golden Palace, and the strongest person in the Liujin Continent is a Triple Dao Realm powerhouse, and his strength is very terrifying.

There are probably more than three hundred Supreme Dao Realm existences in the entire Liujin Continent, and each of them can serve as the city lord of a giant city.

Like the Xuanao Giant City where Ye Tian is at the moment, there is a Supreme Dao Realm existence.

"The small Liujin Continent has so many Supreme Dao Realms, but there is no Supreme Dao Realm in the Origin Realm where I am located. Sure enough, only when you come out can you see the wider world!" Ye Tian muttered.

However, on the Liujin Continent, it is not easy to become the Supreme Dao Realm, and many of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords are not qualified to become the Supreme Dao Realm, and they don't even have the opportunity to impact, if the impact fails, they will also die.

Ye Tian also inquired about how to impact the Dao Realm, but the news he got was not known.

Those forces are strictly limited to the information of the Dao Realm, and if there is no inheritance, many Origin Upper Realm Overlords can only try indiscriminately, and the final outcome is still falling.

However, occasionally some inheritances will leak out, but even if you obtain the Supreme Dao Realm inheritance, you may not have any hope of becoming the Supreme Dao Realm.

In short, here, it is still extremely difficult to become the Supreme Dao Realm.

Ye Tian didn't inquire about the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit, if he did, I was afraid that he would soon be hunted down and killed by the Wuji Heavenly Palace!

He now knew that the force he had offended was the Wuji Heavenly Palace, after all, the entire Wuji Heavenly Palace had already issued a hunt and kill order, and the Liujin Continent also had it, so he naturally saw it.

"The next goal is to obtain the Supreme Dao Realm inheritance!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And according to what he knew, if outsiders wanted to join some forces, they had to at least reach the Dao realm, and if they couldn't even step into the Dao realm, those forces wouldn't want it at all.

After all, there are too many overlords of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm, and they can't get into the eyes of those forces at all.

However, if there was no Supreme Dao Realm inheritance, many Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords would not be able to break through to the Dao Realm, which would almost become a dead loop.

Therefore, those powerful forces were all cultivated to the Dao realm internally.

Like the Supreme Dao Realm of the Liujin Continent, eighty percent belong to the Liuli Golden Palace, and a few rely on the opportunity to break through and succeed on their own, but their potential is exhausted and they are not qualified to join the Liuli Golden Palace.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to improve the strength of this replica body.

He didn't want to continue to change the copy body, the identity of this copy body was very good, at most it would take some time to cultivate it to improve.

Moreover, he has comprehended the rules of the Supreme Dao, and he doesn't need too many resources to improve the cultivation of this replica body, and he doesn't need to think too much, just have some strength.

For example, an ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord is qualified to find the Upper Dao Realm Inheritance.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, thirty solstice years have passed.

The solstice year is the time division on this side of the Infinite Domain, and one solstice year is equivalent to one million primeval epochs in the origin realm, and thirty solstice years are also thirty million primeval epoch years.

And a solstice era is 3,650,000 solstice years.

Thirty solstice years is undoubtedly a very short time on the side of the Infinite Domain.

At this time, Ye Tian raised the strength of this copy body to the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, but the combat power was far inferior to the real body copy body, but at least it was enough.

this day.

He obtained a piece of information that the Liujin Giant City of the Liujin Continent was about to hold an auction, and it was very likely that there would be a Dao Realm inheritance in this auction, at least eight awakenings to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord to be eligible to participate in the auction, and a certain amount of wealth was required, otherwise he would not be able to enter.

In the past thirty years, Ye Tian has also tried his best to obtain a lot of resources, and his wealth can be regarded as accumulating, which is enough to be qualified to participate in the auction.

In the blink of an eye, another solstice year has passed.

Ye Tian came to the Liujin Giant City and went to the auction venue to participate in this auction.

This auction was held by the Wanfeng Chamber of Commerce, and the Wanfeng Chamber of Commerce is a chamber of commerce force that spans the entire Infinite Domain, only doing business and not participating in any battles, but in fact, its strength is even stronger than the Liujin Heavenly Palace.
